title: THE EMPTY RESERVES
description: The finance ministry reports that the city can no longer fund every promised programme. Without immediate action, salaries and essential services may be delayed next month.

choices.outcome: The spending freeze stabilises the budget, but abandoned projects leave several districts angry and construction sites unfinished.

choices.text: Introduce an emergency tax on large corporations.
choices.outcome: The new tax restores part of the city's reserves. Major employers warn that future investment may be moved elsewhere.

choices.text: Impose a severe austerity package immediately.
choices.outcome: The budget recovers quickly, but welfare offices close, public contracts are cancelled, and anger spreads through the city.

delayed_consequences.title: THE COST OF AUSTERITY
delayed_consequences.description: Emergency response times increase, maintenance teams stop attending minor failures, and several public offices remain closed. The financial recovery has come with a visible human cost.
